revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]Created page with '{{Navseasoncats}} [[Category:Shinto by century]] [[Category:21st century in religion|Shinto]]'

fixing the uncategorized categories error
Adding [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
